title: Mugland Financial Web
hook: Money trails, hidden ledgers, and shell dealings may expose how Mugland's power really works.
playerSummary: Zinriss is well placed to follow the quiet finances that connect Mugland to wider criminal enterprise.
gmTruth: This is a core Zinriss thread. Use it for ledgers, intermediaries, respectable fronts, and the discovery that profit and paperwork are holding the violence together.
